UpdateRegionBandwidth.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters, see [ClientToken Idempotency](CSN/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
UpdateRegionBandwidth.localRegion: Local region of the regional bandwidth; cannot be changed
UpdateRegionBandwidth.peerRegion: Peer region of the regional bandwidth; cannot be changed
UpdateRegionBandwidth.bandwidth: Updated bandwidth value for the regional bandwidth
